utils.functions
===============

.. py:module:: utils.functions

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   Shared utility functions used across all blueprints.



Attributes
----------

.. autoapisummary::

   utils.functions.DB_CONFIG


Functions
---------

.. autoapisummary::

   utils.functions.get_db_connection
   utils.functions.to_minutes
   utils.functions.has_time_conflict


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:data:: DB_CONFIG

.. py:function:: get_db_connection()

   Open and return a connection to the MySQL database on AWS RDS.

   Uses DictCursor so columns are accessible by name, matching the
   sqlite3.Row behaviour used throughout the application.

   :returns: An open database connection.
   :rtype: pymysql.connections.Connection


.. py:function:: to_minutes(t)

   Convert a time value to total minutes since midnight.

   Accepts either a ``datetime.timedelta`` (as returned by PyMySQL for TIME
   columns) or a ``'HH:MM'`` / ``'HH:MM:SS'`` string.

   :param t: The time value to convert.
   :type t: timedelta | str

   :returns: Total minutes since midnight.
   :rtype: int


.. py:function:: has_time_conflict(current_schedule, new_times)

   Determine whether a set of new course times conflicts with an existing schedule.

   Two time slots conflict if they share the same day and do not have at least
   a 30-minute gap between them.

   :param current_schedule: Dicts containing 'day', 'start_time',
                            and 'end_time' for each currently enrolled course.
   :type current_schedule: list[dict]
   :param new_times: Dicts with the same keys for the course being evaluated.
   :type new_times: list[dict]

   :returns: True if a conflict is detected, False otherwise.
   :rtype: bool
